name: CognixAI Labs - Outbound Lead Intelligence Platform (Unified)

assignments.name: serperQueries
assignments.value: =["AI SaaS company site:linkedin.com/company","B2B SaaS startup hiring operations","recruitment agency workflow automation","agency scaling operations team","workflow-heavy SaaS company careers"]

nodes.name: Serper Search

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.searchQuery, num: 10, page: $json.page || 1, gl: "us", hl: "en" }) }}

nodes.notes: Serper company discovery. Credential: HTTP Header Auth with X-API-KEY or use env.

nodes.name: Apify Optional Enrich

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ queries: $json.company_name + " official website", maxPagesPerQuery: 1, resultsPerPage: 3 }) }}

nodes.notes: Optional enrichment when APIFY_API_TOKEN is set. On failure, passes through original company item.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.website, formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 60000 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ url: ($json.website || "").replace(/\/$/,"") + "/careers", formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 60000 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ url: ($json.website || "").replace(/\/$/,"") + "/product", formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 60000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const cfg = $('Build Dedup Index').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...cfg, triggerFollowups: true } }];

parameters.content:
## CognixAI Unified Outbound Platform

Triggers: Manual | Discovery cron (Mon/Wed/Fri 06:00) | Follow-up cron (daily 09:00)

Pipeline: Serper discovery -> Apify enrich (optional) -> Firecrawl scrape -> OpenAI analysis -> ICP score -> personalize -> Google Sheets -> Gmail outreach -> follow-ups (3/5/7 days via date filter)

Error branch: wire workflow Settings > Error Workflow to a clone containing only Error Trigger nodes, OR rely on inline continueOnFail paths.

Windows env vars: SERPER_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, APIFY_API_TOKEN (optional), COGNIX_LEADS_SHEET_ID, COGNIX_FROM_EMAIL, COGNIX_HIGH_INTENT_WEBHOOK_URL, COGNIX_ERROR_WEBHOOK_URL
